description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND the user is on the Home page
AND Live Forge content is in the Hero (MLBN linear, SLive)

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to Watch button in the Hero
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Live, <content_title>, <content_description>, Watch Now, press select to play, press up for the Main Menu, press down to browse more content."
